message:
feat(fwc): CLI enhancements — error taxonomy refactor, new_cmd improvements, search, readiness, bench, policy, audit updates

error_taxonomy.rs: Refactored error taxonomy organization.
new_cmd.rs: Connector scaffolding command improvements.
search.rs: New search functionality additions.
readiness.rs: Readiness check enhancements.
bench_cmd.rs: Bench command improvements.
policy_cmd.rs: Policy command refinements.
audit.rs, audit_chain/mod.rs: Audit system updates.
main.rs: CLI command routing and feature additions.
export_tools.rs: Export tooling adjustments.
test_observability.rs: Test observability refactoring.
supply_chain_cmd.rs: Minor fix.
Cargo.toml, benches: Dependency and benchmark updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ fcp-kernel = { path = "../fcp-kernel" }
 fcp-raptorq.workspace = true
 fcp-manifest.workspace = true
 fcp-mesh.workspace = true
+fcp-policy.workspace = true
 fcp-sandbox.workspace = true
 fcp-telemetry.workspace = true
 fcp-testkit.workspace = true
@@ -53,7 +54,7 @@ reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["blocking"] }
 semver.workspace = true
 toml.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
-toon = { package = "tru", path = "/dp/toon_rust" }
+toon = { package = "tru", path = "../../../toon_rust" }
 url.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true

@@ -68,6 +68,10 @@ fn stub_connector(slug: &str, op_count: usize) -> DiscoveredConnector {
         slug: slug.to_owned(),
         manifest_path: format!("connectors/{slug}/manifest.toml"),
         cohort: "dev-tools".to_owned(),
+        manifest_status: None,
+        hidden_by_default: false,
+        non_live_rationale: None,
+        graduation_guidance: None,
         runtime_format: "wasi".to_owned(),
         state_model: MetadataField::Unknown,
         supported_zones: vec!["z:work".to_owned()],

@@ -179,6 +179,10 @@ mod tests {
             slug: slug.to_owned(),
             manifest_path: format!("connectors/{slug}/manifest.toml"),
             cohort: "dev-tools".to_owned(),
+            manifest_status: Some(fcp_manifest::ConnectorStatus::Ready),
+            hidden_by_default: false,
+            non_live_rationale: None,
+            graduation_guidance: None,
             runtime_format: "wasi".to_owned(),
             state_model: MetadataField::Unknown,
             supported_zones: vec!["z:work".to_owned()],
